name: Hanna's French Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the apples into halves, removing the cores.
2. Bring the water and sugar to a boil in a saucepan. Add the apple pieces and simmer gently until soft. Set aside to cool.
3. Preheat the oven to 200°C/400°F/Gas Mark 6.
4. In a large bowl, beat the butter and caster sugar until light and fluffy. Add the egg yolks one at a time, then the blanched almonds and grated lemon rind.
5. Beat the egg whites until they form stiff peaks. Gently fold the egg whites into the almond mixture.
6. Arrange the cooled apples in an ovenproof dish, sprinkling with almonds.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown. Serve lukewarm or cold with custard or whipped cream.
